name: toolchain advisor: observability is recommended and grounded in OpenTelemetry
command:
cat > h.json <<'JEOF'
{"platform":"aws","iac_targets":["terraform"],"build_units":["encryption_at_rest","multi_az"]}
JEOF
cat > req.json <<'JEOF'
{"pillars":{"integration":[{"concern":"message_queue"}],"data":[{"concern":"partitioning"}]}}
JEOF
bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/toolchain-advisor.sh" --handoff h.json --requirements req.json --out tc.json --now 2026-06-08T12:00:00Z 2>/dev/null
node -e 'const j=JSON.parse(require("fs").readFileSync("tc.json","utf8"));const R=j.recommendations;process.exit(R.some(r=>r.category==="observability"&&r.tool==="opentelemetry"&&r.source_id==="opentelemetry-docs")?0:1)' && echo otel 1>&2
